answer_word_limit: one or two words AND/OR a number
grading_notes: answers must be exact match, spelling tolerance allowed
answer_format_notes: Each blank answer must consist of no more than two words and/or a number. Hyphenated compound words count as one word. Numbers may be written as digits or words.

t1_classification.T-1: Question stem uses synonyms or paraphrases of the original lecture wording; repetition rate of content words must be below 40%
t1_classification.T-0: Question stem uses the same or very similar wording as the lecture text
